name: Pasta with Zucchini
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Coarsely chopped pancetta (Note: American bacon can be used)
1 1/2 pounds Zucchini, julienne cut and drained well
recipeInstructions:
Note: American bacon will work, but the flavor is very different.
1. Heat a large frying pan and sauté the pancetta until it becomes clear. Remove the meat and fat from the pan. Drain and discard the fat, then set the meat aside.
2. Add the olive oil to the pan and sauté the garlic for just a moment.
3. Add the well-drained zucchini and sauté over high heat until the zucchini is hot but not mushy.
4. Add the cream and stir.
5. Cook the pasta (penne is preferred) according to package instructions, then toss with the sauce above, adding the pancetta, cheese, salt, and pepper to taste.
